skillSlots.name: Blooming Rose
skillSlots.description: Attack the 2 enemies with highest ATK, dealing 220% ATK Magical DMG. 80% chance to apply 1 stack of [Lust].

skillSlots.name: Boudoir Dreams
skillSlots.description: Attack all enemies, dealing 120% ATK Magical DMG. Additionally deal 100% ATK Magical DMG to the 3 enemies with highest ATK. 80% chance to apply 2 stacks of [Lust].

effects.name: Kiss of Thorns
effects.description: Enemies that attack Venus have 40% chance to gain 1 stack of [Lust].

effects.name: Kiss of Thorns
effects.description: Reduce damage taken by 20% when attacked by targets with [Lust].

effects.name: Kiss of Thorns
effects.description: Increase DMG dealt by 20% when attacking enemies with [Lust].

effects.name: Kiss of Thorns
effects.description: Apply 1 stack of [Obsession] to enemies that have 2 stacks of [Lust].

effects.name: Genesis II
effects.description: Each enemy target with [Lust] grants Venus 25 Speed.

effects.name: Genesis III
effects.description: Chance for enemies attacking Venus to gain [Lust] increased to 80%.

effects.name: Genesis IV
effects.description: Increase Effect Hit Rate by 30% in battle and gain immunity to [Charm].

effects.name: Genesis V
effects.description: When Venus is attacked by an enemy, all enemies with [Obsession] will use Normal Attack on the attacker once. This Normal Attack gains an additional 100% Crit Rate (max 1 trigger per enemy per turn).
